## Summary
- What changed
- Why it changed
- Linked issue / proposal:

## Risk Assessment
- [ ] Settlement invariants unchanged or explicitly documented
- [ ] No new secret/key material introduced
- [ ] Replay and auth paths covered by tests
- [ ] Spirit / Target / Legality / Rejection reviewed
- [ ] Risk and rollback are documented

## Validation
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run compile:solidity`
- [ ] `npm run test:contracts`
- [ ] Commit-named markdown report added

## Migration Notes
- [ ] No migration needed
- [ ] Migration documented

- Execution owner: `platform maintainers` / `user-owned agent` / `mixed`
- Why this belongs in this repository:
- Why this does not violate `docs/Rules/Target.md`:
- Why this does not violate `docs/Rules/Legality.md`:
